evals.description: Generate a minimal C CBKSUB that caches a DISP result at ev_ITERATION_BEG
evals.prompt: Write a C CBKSUB subroutine for Adams that caches the Y-displacement of marker 5 relative to marker 1 at each iteration begin event. The cached value should be accessible by other subroutines. Include the correct Adams SDK headers and use the enum constants for events.

assertions.description: Must include the CBKSUB header
Must use symbolic constant, not raw integer 4
Must handle private events
Must handle private events
Must call c_sysary to retrieve displacement
Must use DISP function name in SYSARY call
Must not use raw integer for ITERATION_BEG
Must not compare against raw private event integer

evals.description: Agent must warn that VFOSUB cannot be called from CBKSUB
evals.prompt: I want to call my VFOSUB subroutine from inside CBKSUB to pre-compute forces at ev_ITERATION_BEG. How do I do that in C?

assertions.description: Must explain that calling VFOSUB from CBKSUB is not allowed
Must suggest the correct alternative pattern (caching)

evals.description: VFOSUB must include the correct iflag guard
evals.prompt: Write a C VFOSUB for Adams that applies a spring force Fx = -k*(x - x0) where k=500 N/mm and x0=100mm. Marker 10 moves, marker 1 is ground. Include everything needed to compile.

assertions.description: Must include an Adams utility header
Must guard against iflag=5 (expression destruction)
Must guard against iflag=7 (serialization)
Must guard against iflag=9 (unserialization)
Must use SYSARY or SYSFNC to get displacement
Must retrieve displacement using DISP fncnam

evals.description: Agent produces a correct MSVC build command
evals.prompt: How do I compile my Adams CBKSUB written in C into a DLL on Windows using MSVC? My Adams is installed at C:\Program Files\MSC.Software\Adams\2023_1

assertions.description: Must use /LD flag for DLL output
Must point to the SDK include directory
Must link against adams_util

evals.description: Agent warns about private events when writing CBKSUB switch
evals.prompt: Write a C CBKSUB switch statement that handles all 44 Adams events.

assertions.description: Must mention private event 1
Must mention private event 2
Must indicate private events should be ignored
Should not use raw integer for private event
